name: Xylem Transport Process
description: Xylem Transport Process in Plants. This process represents a higher-level biological mechanism distinct from molecular/biochemical processes covered in GLMP.
mermaid:
graph TD
    A43[Root Water Uptake] --> B43[Osmotic Pressure]
    B43 --> C43[Transpiration Pull]
    C43 --> D43[Xylem Vessels]
    D43 --> E43[Cohesion-Tension]
    E43 --> F43[Upward Movement]
    F43 --> G43[Leaf Delivery]
    G43 --> H43[Transpiration]
    
    style A43 fill:#ff6b6b,color:#fff
    style C43 fill:#ff6b6b,color:#fff
    style B43 fill:#ffd43b,color:#000
    style D43 fill:#ffd43b,color:#000
    style E43 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff
    style F43 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff
    style G43 fill:#74c0fc,color:#fff
    style H43 fill:#b197fc,color:#fff

sources.title: Programming Framework: A Universal Process Visualization Methodology
sources.notes: Higher-level biological process visualization: Xylem Transport Process. Created using the Programming Framework methodology for organismal and ecological process analysis.

sources.title: The cohesion-tension theory, xylogenesis, and the distribution of wood function
sources.journal: Proc Natl Acad Sci U S A

sources.title: Xylem function and water transport in plants
Plant hydraulics: Xylem cavitation limits carbon gain and drives mortality during drought

notes: Higher-level biological process. GLMP covers biochemical/molecular processes; this database covers organismal/ecological processes.
